emails.subject: Search for sigs
emails.body: Search for sigs Hi Rebecca, I'm trying to locate the sig pages for the NW guaranty. These were the docs that I approved after I had approved the letter agreement. These signed pages weren't with the letter agreements and change orders you brought me. To you remember if you brought them to me before? I haven't really searched I thought I would ask first. Thanks, Kay

emails.subject: Re: Search for sigs
emails.body: Re: Search for sigs Kay I do have those sig pages. Sorry about that I thought I had already given them to you. I will bring them up to you this morning. Regards, Rebecca Kay Mann 05/14/2001 05:39 PM
